nasb.text: I will abandon the remnant of My inheritance and deliver them into the hand of their enemies, and they will become as plunder and spoil to all their enemies;

esv.text: And I will forsake the remnant of my heritage and give them into the hand of their enemies, and they shall become a prey and a spoil to all their enemies,

cnv.text: 我要捨棄我的產業的餘民，把他們交在他們的仇敵手上；他們要成為他們的仇敵的掠物和戰利品。

ccb.text: 我要撇弃我残存的子民，把他们交给敌人，任其掳掠。
